name: Shay Cormac
description:
The legendary Assassin-turned-Templar. Complex, ruthless hunter with the weight of the world on his shoulders.

UPDATED! Longer intro, cleaned-up character definition for (hopefully) better memory, added more personality details now that I’m replaying Rogue.

AnyPov, no specific scenario, you can be pretty much anyone. Set after the assasination of Adéwalé. (Character details hidden to prevent bot stealing - sorry.)
creator: roguefear
